operatingModelDiagram.title: Agentic Engineering Transformation Model
operatingModelDiagram.headline: From modernization strategy to managed evolution

phases.title: Strategy & Mobilize
phases.summary: Set direction, value, and adoption approach.

phases.title: Design
phases.summary: Model domains, flows, boundaries, and agent roles.

phases.title: Build
phases.summary: Engineer with human-agent collaboration, testing, and security.

phases.title: Release & Adopt
phases.summary: Deploy through governed pipelines and transition to usage.

phases.title: Operate & Evolve
phases.summary: Run, observe, improve, and modernize continuously.

layers.title: Risk & Use-Case Governance
layers.summary: Decide what should be agentic and how much autonomy is allowed.

layers.title: Human Accountability & Decision Rights
layers.summary: Define owners, approvals, and escalation paths.

layers.title: Technical Controls & Assurance
layers.summary: Enforce policy, testing, rollout controls, and containment.

layers.title: Transparency, Evidence & Compliance
layers.summary: Preserve auditability, evidence, and decision reconstruction.

layers.title: Workforce Enablement & Responsible Use
layers.summary: Train people to use, supervise, and improve agentic systems.

layers.title: Learning & Governance Adaptation
layers.summary: Continuously recalibrate policy and autonomy based on evidence.
